title: Freeze medium-scene-fragment rules and runtime contract
description: Update the existing blind-box unittest suite with reusable medium-scale scene fragment rule helpers and sample-level checks before any 20-scene data rewrite. This task should encode allowed fourth-pool semantics, oversized-subject exclusions, tiny-subject exclusions, and upgraded information-surface exceptions without enabling full-list assertions that would intentionally fail against the current data.
acceptance_criteria: 1 reusable rule baseline exists in the unittest file and covers 4 rule groups: allowed medium-scene fragments, forbidden oversized subjects, forbidden tiny subjects, upgraded information-surface exceptions.
Helper/sample-level tests pass against representative allowed and forbidden examples.
Existing structural/runtime tests remain green before the full rewrite starts; full-list data assertions are deferred to IMPL-3.

produces: A stable rule baseline for fourth-pool content
A green-suite baseline before data rewrite
ready_for: IMPL-2 can begin once the test file defines the boundary vocabulary without making the suite red
